title: Optimization Algorithms
summary: Algorithms used to minimize or maximize a objective function, such as stochastic gradient descent, Adam, and RMSProp. It sits inside Foundations / Core Concepts. Compare it with Model and Machine Learning. It opens into MAP Optimization and Meta-Optimization.
